Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Gregory Sogoyan, Esq. (310.933.4271; gsogoyan@qillarrowlaw.com) of Quill & Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Joshua Alegado, Esq. (no information provided) for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID MOLLO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Requests For Production Of Documents, Set Two is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff's request for production of documents, set two, #1-9 is GRANTED with #3 being further framed and #10-32 is DENIED. Further responses due November 17, 2022.

Counsel for Plaintiff to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances by any party or counsel.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.'S Motion To Compel Inspection Of Plaintiff's Vehicle And Continue Trial; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Counsel Of Record In The Amount Of $2,960.00.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Motion granted. No Opposition filed. Plaintiff shall produce the vehicle that is the subject of the Inspection Demand for inspection as described in the inspection demand on or before October 14, 2022.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to Judge Pro Tem William Lynn at williamclynn@gmail.com.
